cpu: AMD Ryzen 5 2400G with Radeon Vega Graphics
notes: Runs perfectly, even on a Ryzen APU. Drop down to 720p to get 60FPS on hardware this slow, though.
title: Spark the Electric Jester 2

notes: The game runs relatively well after switching on Wine D3d11. Runs at a low frame-rate on my computer, and the Unity launcher doesn't appear, preventing you from changing the game's graphical settings. May work better on a more powerful system.
title: Spark the Electric Jester 2

notes: No tweaks needed, works perfectly, FPS is through the roof
title: Spark the Electric Jester 2
